title: terminalia ovata var. angustifolia
intro: Terminalia ovata var. angustifolia, commonly known as the narrow-leaved toon or Indian teak, is a plant species belonging to the Combretaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Terminalia ovata var. angustifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, among others. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for use in traditional herbal medicine, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical formulations.
